transitmattr 0.1.0
  • Reference

  • Changelog

Package index

Stop Lookup — Rapid Transit

tm_stop_id()
Look up numeric stop IDs for a rapid transit station
tm_place_id()
Look up the GTFS place ID for a rapid transit station
tm_line_stations()
List all stations on a rapid transit line
tm_line_directions()
Get direction names for a rapid transit line

Stop Lookup — Bus

tm_bus_stop_id()
Look up stop IDs for a bus route station
tm_bus_stations()
List all stations on a bus route
tm_bus_routes()
List all available bus routes

Stop Lookup — Commuter Rail

tm_cr_stop_id()
Look up stop IDs for a commuter rail station
tm_cr_place_id()
Look up the GTFS place ID for a commuter rail station
tm_cr_stations()
List all stations on a commuter rail line
tm_cr_routes()
List all available commuter rail routes

Stop Lookup — Ferry

tm_ferry_stop_id()
Look up stop IDs for a ferry station
tm_ferry_stations()
List all stations on a ferry route
tm_ferry_routes()
List all available ferry routes

Travel Times

tm_travel_times()
Get travel time data for a date
tm_aggregate_travel_times()
Get aggregate travel times
tm_aggregate_travel_times2()
Get aggregate travel times (v2)

Headways

tm_headways()
Get headway data for a date
tm_aggregate_headways()
Get aggregate headways

Dwells

tm_dwells()
Get dwell time data for a date
tm_aggregate_dwells()
Get aggregate dwells

Service & Ridership

tm_ridership()
Get ridership data
tm_scheduled_service()
Get scheduled service data
tm_service_hours()
Get service hours data
tm_service_ridership_dashboard()
Get the service ridership dashboard summary
tm_trip_metrics()
Get trip metrics by line

Alerts & Delays

tm_alerts()
Get MBTA service alerts
tm_line_delays()
Get delay data by line

Other

tm_facilities()
List MBTA facilities
tm_routes()
List all available routes
tm_stops()
Get stops for a route
tm_speed_restrictions()
Get slow zone / speed restriction data
tm_time_predictions()
Get current time predictions
tm_healthcheck()
Check API health
tm_git_id()
Get the deployed git commit ID

On this page

Developed by Andrew Kouré.
